title: Finland's Quantum Technology Strategy 2025–2035
summary: National strategy published in the Finnish Government publications repository aiming to give Finland a prominent role in developing and using quantum technology over 2025–2035. Whether it contains an explicit post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography reference is not confirmed from the candidate metadata, so flagged for human review.

title: From threat scenarios to quantum-safe cryptography: how to secure digital trust
issuingOrg: VTT Technical Research Centre of Finland
summary: Article from Finland's state research institute VTT discussing quantum-safe cryptography and the need for near-term solutions to maintain digital trust. Institutional Finnish research body and explicitly PQC-themed, but a news/story page rather than a formal publication, so flagged for human review.

title: Finnish Quantum Technology Roadmap
summary: Evolving Finnish quantum technology roadmap from InstituteQ (the Finnish national quantum institute) covering quantum computing, communication and sensing. An explicit post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography focus is not confirmed from the candidate metadata, so flagged for human review.

title: Suomen kansallisen kryptotyöryhmän linjaukset kansallisiin PQC-salaustuotearviointeihin 1.1.2026 alkaen
summary: Finland's national cryptography working group sets binding requirements that, from 1 January 2026, cryptographic products entering national evaluation must use quantum-safe key-establishment (PQC KEM) and quantum-safe signature algorithms (or document how quantum risk is addressed), with hybrid PQC-plus-classical strongly recommended. Published 3 October 2025.

title: Kvanttiturvallinen salaus ja PQC-siirtymä (organisaatioiden ohjesivusto)
summary: Official Traficom/NCSC-FI guidance hub for organisations on the quantum threat to current encryption and on planning the migration to quantum-safe cryptography (PQC), covering crypto-inventory, risk assessment, crypto-agility and a step-by-step transition plan. Launched alongside the March 2026 guidance release.

title: Ohje kvanttiturvalliseen salaukseen siirtymisestä julkaistu, infotilaisuus asiantuntijoille
summary: NCSC-FI news item (4 March 2026) announcing publication of its guidance on migrating to quantum-safe encryption and an expert info session, urging organisations to protect long-confidentiality data such as personal, health and classified information against the quantum threat.

title: Kvanttiteknologian tulevaisuus ja kvanttiturvallinen internet (Tulevaisuusvaliokunnan julkaisu 2/2025)
issuingOrg: Eduskunnan tulevaisuusvaliokunta (Finnish Parliament, Committee for the Future)
summary: Finnish Parliament Committee for the Future publication (2/2025) with a dedicated chapter on quantum-safe cryptography (PQC), the 2025-2030 cryptographic transition, and a 'PQC-siirtymän prosessi' (PQC migration process) section setting out concrete migration steps. Parliamentary issuer with explicit PQC content; flagged for review only because eduskunta.fi is not on the auto-include trusted-domain list.
